task_objective: Close feature gaps between ibis-profiling and ydata-profiling (Metadata, Extreme Values, Spearman, Text Lengths).
design_decisions: Categorized new features into 'Minimal' and 'Full' modes based on complexity.
Implemented DuckDB-specific memory size calculation using CALL pragma_storage_info().
Used a multi-pass approach for Spearman correlation and Monotonicity to avoid DuckDB window function nesting restrictions.
Added estimation fallback for memory size based on data types for non-DuckDB backends.
results: Successfully implemented Spearman correlation, monotonicity checks, extreme value detection, and string length analysis. All new features are verified with tests and integrated into the report model.
